items.title_en: Japanese yen sinks to weakest level since 1986, keeping intervention risks in focus
items.title_zh: 日元跌至1986年以来最低水平，干预风险继续成为焦点
items.desc_en: The Japanese yen weakened to its lowest level against the U.S. dollar since 1986 on Tuesday, keeping investors on alert for possible intervention from Japanese authorities.
items.desc_zh: 周二日元兑美元汇率跌至1986年以来的最低水平，令投资者对日本当局可能采取的干预保持警惕。

items.title_en: Trump says he picks Sonderling to be labor secretary
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他选择桑德林担任劳工部长
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social on Monday that he would nominate Keith Sonderling, who is acting labor secretary, to take on the role permanently, which would require Senate approval.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周一在 Truth Social 上发帖称，他将提名代理劳工部长基思·桑德林 (Keith Sonderling) 永久担任这一职务，这需要参议院批准。

items.title_en: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now

items.title_en: DR Congo bans mass gatherings in the  capital to prevent spread of Ebola

items.title_en: Supreme Court blocks Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook

items.desc_zh: 这一决定被视为央行独立性的胜利，将有关罢免的斗争送回下级法院。

items.title_en: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal

items.desc_en: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law-enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.
items.desc_zh: 随着 ICE 寻求价值 2.2 亿美元的泰瑟枪交易，Axon Enterprise 加大了在国会有关联邦执法技术的游说力度。

items.title_en: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
items.title_zh: 美国表示已同意在与伊朗交锋后“退出”
items.desc_en: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.
items.desc_zh: 周末发生的一系列袭击事件导致美国和伊朗互相指责对方违反停火协议。

items.title_en: Pakistan launches deadly strikes along Afghan border
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦沿阿富汗边境发动致命袭击
items.desc_en: Pakistan says its strikes were a response to "recent terrorist attacks against innocent people".
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦表示，其袭击是对“最近针对无辜人民的恐怖袭击”的回应。

items.desc_zh: 韩国队在八支表现最好的第三名球队中失利后被淘汰。
